title: Requirements: Backend Claim Limit Validation
response:
Feedback Summary (2 comments):

General Comments:
1. There is no system admin role, only have employee user.

Specific Text Comments:
1. "Use database aggregation (SUM query) instead of lo...": Instead of raw SQL query, use the TypeORM feature to fetch the data instead.

comments.comment: Instead of raw SQL query, use the TypeORM feature to fetch the data instead.
comments.selectedText:
Use database aggregation (SUM query) instead of loading all claims into memory
- Query pattern: `WHERE userId = ? AND category = ? AND month = ? AND year = ? AND status != 'deleted'`

comments.comment: There is no system admin role, only have employee user.
